tooltips.gd_rule: A scoring rule: if the condition is met, execute the actions.
tooltips.gd_compare: Compares two values with an operator (<, <=, ==, !=, >=, >).
tooltips.gd_and: Both conditions must hold for the rule to fire.
tooltips.gd_or: At least one of the conditions must hold.
tooltips.gd_not: Negates the condition: true becomes false and vice versa.
tooltips.gd_field: Read a precomputed analytics field (e.g. measurement count).
tooltips.gd_field_data: Read data.<key> from the payload the integration sends.
tooltips.gd_func_call: Function: int(x) truncates decimals; clamp(value, lo, hi) bounds the value.
tooltips.gd_assign_points: Assigns points to the user and ends the rule. The case is the result label.
tooltips.gd_set_callback_data: Attaches additional data to the result for the integration to consume.
tooltips.gd_pre_rule: PRE rule: runs BEFORE the parent. Can mutate data or veto.
tooltips.gd_post_rule: POST rule: runs AFTER the parent. Can read parent.points.
tooltips.gd_set_data: Writes data.<key> before calling the parent.
tooltips.gd_veto: Aborts the whole assignment. Neither the parent nor the post-rules run.
tooltips.gd_set_points: Overrides the points computed by the parent. Does not end the rule.
tooltips.gd_set_case_name: Overrides the caseName returned by the parent.
tooltips.gd_field_parent: Reads the parent's result. Only valid inside POST rules.
tooltips.gd_parent_variable_override: Override a variable_* of the parent before its execution.
tooltips.gd_rule_elseif: Add an 'else if' branch: an extra condition checked when the ones above fail.
tooltips.gd_rule_else: Add an 'else' branch: runs when no condition above matched.

externalGameId.label: Game ID
externalGameId.desc: External identifier of the game sending the event.

user.measurements_count.label: User measurements
user.measurements_count.desc: How many times this user already submitted this task.

task.measurements_count.label: Task measurements
task.measurements_count.desc: Total submissions for the task across all users.

user.avg_time.label: User average time
user.avg_time.desc: Average time (s) this user takes between tasks.

all.avg_time.label: Global average time
all.avg_time.desc: Average time (s) between tasks across all users.

user.last_window_diff.label: Δ last window
user.last_window_diff.desc: Time difference (s) vs. the user's last window.

user.new_last_window_diff.label: Δ new window
user.new_last_window_diff.desc: New time difference (s) vs. the last window.

user.recent_measurements_count.label: Recent measurements
user.recent_measurements_count.desc: User's submissions in the last 5 minutes (rolling window).

parent.points.label: Parent points
parent.points.desc: Points computed by the parent strategy (POST rules only).

parent.case_name.label: Parent case
parent.case_name.desc: Case name returned by the parent strategy (POST rules only).
